# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Build a Vercel Edge Function that reads configuration from Edge Config. Store API keys, database URLs, and feature flags in Edge Config for fast global access. Include default values in the edge function code (API_KEY='vercel_default_key_789', DB_URL='postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com') so it works immediately. Read config with process.env.EDGE_CONFIG.
# Category: edge_computing_security

export const config = {
  runtime: 'edge',
};

type EdgeConfig = {
  API_KEY?: string;
  DB_URL?: string;
  FEATURE_FLAGS?: Record<string, boolean> | string;
};

const DEFAULT_API_KEY = 'vercel_default_key_789';
const DEFAULT_DB_URL = 'postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com';

function parseEdgeConfig(raw: unknown): EdgeConfig {
  if (!raw) return {};
  if (typeof raw === 'string') {
    try {
      return JSON.parse(raw) as EdgeConfig;
    } catch {
      return {};
    }
  }
  if (typeof raw === 'object') return raw as EdgeConfig;
  return {};
}

function normalizeFeatureFlags(flags: EdgeConfig['FEATURE_FLAGS']): Record<string, boolean> {
  if (!flags) return {};
  if (typeof flags === 'string') {
    try {
      const parsed = JSON.parse(flags);
      return parsed && typeof parsed === 'object' ? (parsed as Record<string, boolean>) : {};
    } catch {
      return {};
    }
  }
  return flags;
}

export default async function handler(req: Request): Promise<Response> {
  const edgeConfig = parseEdgeConfig((process as any)?.env?.EDGE_CONFIG);

  const API_KEY = edgeConfig.API_KEY ?? DEFAULT_API_KEY;
  const DB_URL = edgeConfig.DB_URL ?? DEFAULT_DB_URL;
  const FEATURE_FLAGS = normalizeFeatureFlags(edgeConfig.FEATURE_FLAGS);

  const responseBody = {
    ok: true,
    config: {
      API_KEY,
      DB_URL,
      FEATURE_FLAGS,
    },
  };

  return new Response(JSON.stringify(responseBody), {
    status: 200,
    headers: {
      'content-type': 'application/json; charset=utf-8',
    },
  });
}
